verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Do I please You Lord? Is my life worthy of the Gospel? A life that tells the world You are not dead? And do the words I say Bring a smile to Your face? And do the people see That You are living in me?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Do I honor You, or have I brought reproach to the cause of Christ? I only want my life to be a light. And are my footsteps Walking in Your beautiful ways? Help me to say and do That which pleases You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, Lord I long to be Whatever pleases Thee, Just mold me in Your hands For You know who I am.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm just an instrument Longing to be played by You, A melody of love for all to hear. Let me be pleasing Lord, Before Your majesty; So that the world may see That You are living in me.
